topics.title: GSC opportunity review: Last Z Redeem Codes — Active Codes, Gift Center Login, and UID
topics.source_reference: GSC weekly 2026-05-03: page opportunity and query-page signals
topics.notes: Highest-value opportunity: very large impression volume on a cornerstone economy page with multiple low-CTR gift center queries, indicating strong potential for better intent alignment while preserving the canonical role of the page. Prior run `2026-05-05-codes-gsc-opportunity-llm-approved-intake` is `closed`; keep this topic in monitoring unless new evidence materially changes the opportunity.
topics.player_value: Faster path to redeem codes and gift-center answers, reducing friction for users searching login/redeem flow information.
topics.duplication_risk: Medium; there is some risk of overlapping with other economy/codes intents, but the constraints explicitly protect canonical claim separation.
claims_to_verify: The existing page can cover gift center login intent without blurring role separation.
Any added guidance preserves gift-center-only-redeem-flow and gift-rewards-mailbox claims.
The backlog history does not already exhaust the likely opportunity.
topics.next_step: Human owner review to confirm whether a scoped first-screen and section-structure update can improve intent match without expanding the page beyond its canonical role.
evidence: GSC page signal: codes.html had 24154 impressions, 503 clicks, 2.08% CTR, avg position 6.46.
Low CTR query: `last z gift center` had 3048 impressions, 104 clicks, 3.41% CTR, position 6.98.
Low CTR query: `last z gift center login` had 959 impressions, 44 clicks, 4.59% CTR, position 5.56.
Low CTR query: `lastz gift center` had 501 impressions, 20 clicks, 3.99% CTR, position 6.89.
Low CTR query: `last-z.com gift center` had 472 impressions, 20 clicks, 4.24% CTR, position 6.22.
